title: relegation_zone is a bottom-N proxy, not real CBF relegation rules
evidence: src/queries/competitions.ts:74 bottomOfTable returns last N of calculated table; server.ts:214 tool description notes exact rules 'are not encoded in the match data'
suggestion: Acceptable given data limits; documented in tool description and README.

title: Non-Serie-A/Copa tournaments in BR-Football-Dataset fold into an 'Other' competition bucket
suggestion: Fine for the spec's three named competitions; 'Other' rows are still queryable by team.

title: Known dataset gaps documented, not code defects
evidence: README.md 'Data quality handling' section notes fifa_data.csv lacks some Brazilian clubs/players (e.g. no Flamengo squad, no 'Gabriel Barbosa')
suggestion: No action; genuine source-data limitation surfaced honestly.
